MOTION / Notice Of Motion & Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And For Entry Of [Proposed] Consent Judgment As To Defendant Wobbleworks, Inc.
Off Calendar Sep-15-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF ECOLOGICAL RIGHTS FOUNDATION'S Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And For Entry Of [Proposed] Consent Judgment As To Defendant Wobbleworks, Inc.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Based on its review of the supplemental Gaffney and Evenson declarations, and of the original moving papers, the court grants plaintiff Ecological Rights Foundation's motion to approve the Proposition 65 settlement and for entry of consent judgment as to defendant Wobbleworks, Inc. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the requirements for Proposition 65 settlements under Health & Safety Code section 25249.7. The Court finds that the warning that is required by the settlement complies with Health & Safety Code sections 25249.5-25249.14; the award of attorney's fees is reasonable under California law; and the penalty amount is reasonable based on the criteria set forth in Health & Safety Code section 25249.7(b)(2).

Order signed. Separate judgment signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/EPS)
